title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Dell India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Dell India
jsonLd.description:
Dell India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Chandigarh operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Dell India:
Dell India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dell India!
